execute.stdout:
hi -> short
hello -> medium
goodmorning -> long
ok -> short

code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 10
    let line = string.substring(text, start, i)
    let len = string.len(line)
    if len > 0
      if len <= 3
        println("#{line} -> short")
      else if len <= 7
        println("#{line} -> medium")
      else
        println("#{line} -> long")
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
let line = string.substring(text, start, n)
let len = string.len(line)
if len > 0
  if len <= 3
    println("#{line} -> short")
  else if len <= 7
    println("#{line} -> medium")
  else
    println("#{line} -> long")
  end
end
